reviews.review_description: Needs to how to restart button cuz leaving the map is it takes too long to get back in the map to just try again. And he needs to add more cars

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback!
We understand how frustrating it can be when it takes too long to get back into the map just to try again.

The good news is:
We are adding a quick “Restart” button in an upcoming update, so you’ll be able to reset instantly without leaving the map.

We also plan to add more vehicles and expand the game’s content as we continue to update it.

Your comment helps us prioritize what players want the most, so thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts.
We appreciate your support and hope you’ll enjoy the new updates soon!

reviews.review_description: When I hit the gas I got dizzy instantly. Also give an option to remap the gas using the right trigger button using left forward feels so odd

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback, and we're really sorry to hear that you felt dizzy while accelerating.
Motion comfort is extremely important in VR, and we take this very seriously.

We are currently working on improvements that will:

Add more comfort options to reduce dizziness

Improve acceleration smoothing

Allow players to remap controls, including using the right trigger for gas

Your comment helps us understand how different players experience the game, and it really guides our next updates.

Thank you for playing, and we hope the upcoming patches will make the experience much more comfortable for you!

reviews.review_description: If you can’t hit off-road in real life, I recommend this game for you. Controls are comfortable and it’s quite fun to play.

developer_response.body: Thank you, have a good game!

reviews.review_description: For those seeking the thrill of offroad adventure in VR, this game is the perfect choice.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the awesome feedback! We're thrilled you’re enjoying the offroad adventure in VR. We’ll continue to enhance the experience with even more exciting features in future updates!
Thank you, have a good game! Your comment motivated us a lot

reviews.review_description:
This is a great concept for a VR racer but in its current form it’s way too rough to be enjoyable.

The problems begin the moment you get in the driver’s seat and look around.  You’re only tracked in 3DOF. I don’t think I’ve ever encountered a game on the 6DOF Quest that tracks in 3DOF, it’s extraordinarily odd.  It feels like a game ported from an old 3DOF headset like an Oculus Go or Samsung Gear VR.

Mapping the gas and brake to the left analog stick would be fine if you had the option to remap the functions to a more standard location, like the right and left triggers.  Speaking of options, there are only two. One that switches all sounds off, and another that’s an icon of squiggly tire treads. I don’t know what the tire tread icon does and I don’t really care at this point.  I also don’t understand why there’s a button to mute ALL sounds, when I selected it I assumed it would just silence the music.

The worst part is that it’s just awful to drive.  It doesn’t feel even remotely realistic.

And finally the graphics don’t look that great in the headset. The draw distance is very close and it has the overall appearance of a game from decades ago.

I don’t know why this is getting glowing reviews.  I’m glad other people are enjoying it though.

developer_response.body: version 5 : 6dof motion control added :) Have a good game !

reviews.review_description:
Video review: https://youtu.be/PMTkEvtKHSw

OFFROAD came as a big surprise. What a fantastic 4x4 racing game! It has a great start with well-crafted levels that lead to a fair and challenging 4x4 gameplay experience (I was surprised at how good it felt). It also has short gameplay sessions, simple controls, and an immersive driving experience.

Although the game can lead to hand fatigue, I recommend either putting your hands on an armchair or a real simulation driving steering wheel if you have one alongside the controllers (it might work well, I haven't tried it). I think there are also Quest 2 accessories to make it more immersive but I yet to try anything out.

This is one of those VR games that would benefit greatly from higher realism, and unfortunately the graphics are not impressive but not bad either.

That aside, none of that took away from the fun and challenge of trying to go back and finish the previous levels faster to get more stars to progress.

Definitely worth it if you're looking for an immersive and challenging realistic 4x4 offroad racing experience in VR for Quest 2.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for both your video review and detailed feedback. We greatly value your early comments as our game continues to evolve

reviews.review_description: Very good graphics. Once reset view on headset the hands appear in right place Real good challenge from level one controls very responsive.   Could be a real addictive go to game. Well done devs. Hopefully I will get off level one🤪🤪🤪

developer_response.body: Thank you, have a good game!

reviews.review_title: Is it a racing or crawling game?
reviews.review_description: It's a 4x4 crawling game where your in a hurry ??? Crawling is about getting from point A to point B without getting stuck ....speed has nothing to do with it. So if you don't crawl fast enough you get no reward???

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your valuable comment. this is just gamification. we need to distinguish between those who do better and those who do worse, one of which is the reward system and time.

reviews.review_title: Great in both graphics and gameplay!
reviews.review_description: The game has really outstanding physics and good graphics. Wish for long time support and content updates. Even with current content the price is fully worth it.

developer_response.body: Thank you, have a good game!

reviews.review_description: It has been a real off-road experience. The car's physics, movements, and courses are all very well done. I want more levels and more cars !

reviews.review_description:
I finally stumbled upon one of the most fantastic games on the Meta Quest Store, and I can't wait to share this unforgettable experience with you.

The physics engine of the game is truly mesmerizing. Character movements and interactions with objects are incredibly realistic and seamless. Manipulating objects around you provides a unique pleasure and opens up new strategies within the game world. Thanks to the high-quality physics effects, the game immerses you completely, making you feel like a part of its universe.

However, it's not just the physics; the game's level designs are crafted with exceptional skill. Each level is distinct and thoughtfully designed. The creative challenges in these levels always keep you on your toes and eager to improve. As you progress, the excitement of moving to the next level and the satisfaction of achieving your goals amplify, all thanks to the successful level designs.

One of the most impressive aspects of the game is undoubtedly its entertainment value. Every moment spent playing is enjoyable, and time flies without you realizing it. The seamless progression, fun puzzles, and constantly innovative mechanics allow you to get lost in the game world without ever getting bored. For me, this game has been one of the most enjoyable experiences this year, and I keep coming back to play it over and over again.

In conclusion, this game is a masterpiece! If you're looking for a delightful gaming experience with physics-based mechanics, thrilling level design, and endless fun, you absolutely must give this game a try. It offers a satisfying and unforgettable experience in terms of physics, level design, and overall enjoyment. Highly recommended!

developer_response.body: Thank you, have a good game!

reviews.review_description: Love the game hate the steering, it begins to move without touching it and losing control when steering.

developer_response.body: Thank you, have a good game!
